title: Aralam Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Aralam Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Kerala

overview.short: Aralam Butterfly Sanctuary is the northernmost wildlife sanctuary of Kerala, southwest India.
overview.description: Aralam Butterfly Sanctuary is the northernmost wildlife sanctuary of Kerala, southwest India. It is 55 km2 (21 sq mi) in area and located on the western slope of the Western Ghats. It was established in 1984 with its headquarters near Iritty with the name Aralam Wildlife Sanctuary. In July 2025, it was renamed to Aralam Butterfly Sanctuary.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Ambayathode
topPlaces.description: Ambayathode is a hilly village near to Kottiyoor temple in the Kannur district of Kerala, India. Ambayathodu witnessed massive landslides during Kerala Floods 2018.

topPlaces.name: Kottiyoor Temple
topPlaces.description: Kottiyoor Temple is a prominent Shiva temple in Kottiyoor, Kannur, Kerala, India. Vadakkeshwaram Temple is the common name of the temple from ancient times, but some of the local people address the temple as Ikkare Kottiyoor as it is on the bank of the river close to the Kottiyoor village, to differentiate it from the shrine in the other side of the river.

topPlaces.name: Kottiyoor Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Kottiyoor Wildlife Sanctuary is Wildlife Sanctuary located in Eastern Hilly Areas in Kannur district of Kerala, India. Situated near to other sanctuaries in Kerala and Karnataka, the Kottiyoor Wildlife Sanctuary is rich in biodiversity and rich flora and fauna.

topPlaces.name: Kottiyoor
topPlaces.description: Kottiyoor is a village and gram panchayat in the easterly hills of Kannur district in Kerala state. Kottiyoor is the twenty third wildlife sanctuary of Kerala, located in the hills of Western Ghats.

topPlaces.name: Boys Town, Mananthavady
topPlaces.description: Boys Town is a village in the Mananthavady taluk in the Wayanad district of Kerala, India. The village is 13 km (8.1 mi) from Mananthavady.

topPlaces.name: Palchuram
topPlaces.description: Palchuram is a mountain pass located in Kottiyoor Wildlife Sanctuary of Kerala, India across the Western Ghats. Height of Palchuram is 3,000 ft (910 m).

topPlaces.name: Periya, Wayanad
topPlaces.description: Periya is a village located in Wayanad district in Kerala, India. Periya Surrounded by Western Ghats forests, it features lush green tea and coffee estates.

topPlaces.name: Kelakam, India
topPlaces.description: Kelakam is a town and grama panchayat located in the Kannur district of Kerala state, India. Kerala Hill Highway (SH 59) and the proposed Mananthavady Mattanur airport road pass through Kelakam town.

Kottiyoor Temple is a prominent Shiva temple in Kottiyoor, Kannur, Kerala, India. Vadakkeshwaram Temple is the common name of the temple from ancient times, but some of the local people address the temple as Ikkare Kottiyoor as it is on the bank of the river close to the Kottiyoor village, to differentiate it from the shrine in the other side of the river.

Kottiyoor Wildlife Sanctuary is Wildlife Sanctuary located in Eastern Hilly Areas in Kannur district of Kerala, India. Situated near to other sanctuaries in Kerala and Karnataka, the Kottiyoor Wildlife Sanctuary is rich in biodiversity and rich flora and fauna.

Kelakam is a town and grama panchayat located in the Kannur district of Kerala state, India. Kerala Hill Highway (SH 59) and the proposed Mananthavady Mattanur airport road pass through Kelakam town.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Aralam Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Aralam Wildlife Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Aralam Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (83 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (95 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Aralam Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Aralam Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Aralam Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Aralam Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Aralam Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ambayathode, Kottiyoor Temple, Kottiyoor Wildlife Sanctuary, Kottiyoor, Boys Town, Mananthavady.
